basic_details.job_title: BEML Executives Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 18 Various Manager Posts
basic_details.organization_name: BEML Limited (A Miniratna Category-I PSU under Ministry of Defence)
basic_details.post_name: Deputy General Manager, Assistant General Manager, Assistant Manager, Sr. Manager etc.
basic_details.short_information: BEML Limited has published multiple recruitment notifications (Advt. No. KP/S/07/2026, KP/S/08/2026 & KP/S/09/2026) dated 29 April 2026 for various Executive positions in Rail/Engine Project, Rajbhasha (Official Language) and Special Recruitment Drive for backlog vacancies of SC/ST/OBC. The recruitment drive aims to fill multiple vacancies across different grades and disciplines. Candidates with relevant engineering qualifications and post-qualification experience are eligible to apply online at www.bemlindia.in. The application process will be active till 18 May 2026 (18:00 Hrs). Candidates c

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on 14.05.2026. First Class Degree in relevant Engineering discipline with prescribed Post Qualification Experience (PQE) is mandatory. | Key Positions & Requirements (Summary): | DGM (Grade VII): 16 years PQE, Upper Age 45/48/50 years (as applicable) AGM (Grade VI): 13 years PQE, Upper Age 45/47 years Assistant Manager (Grade III): 4 years PQE, Upper Age 30 years Manager (Grade IV): 8 years PQE, Upper Age 34 years | Educational Qualification: First Class full-time Engineering Degree in relevant discipline (Mechanical, Electrical, Electronics, Civil etc.). PG desirable for some posts.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Assistant Manager / (Gr III) Raj Bhasha Official Language Or Manager (Gr IV) Raj Bhasha / Official Language
Deputy General Manager (Gr-VII) Testing and Calibration

selection_process: Selection will be through Shortlisting of applications followed by Assessment / Interview. Shortlisted candidates will undergo pre-employment medical examination and document verification.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the BEML career portal. Candidates are required to upload all relevant documents including educational certificates, experience certificates, caste/PwD certificates etc.
The candidates are required to apply ONLINE only(which is mandatory) after going through the prescribed guidelines and ensuring correctness of the data entered in the portal / form.
The candidates can access the on-line application form in our career page at www.bemlindia.in. The on-line registration site would be available till 18.00 Hrs on 18th of May, 2026.
Towards accessing the On-line application, the candidate should have a valid e-mail and mobile number for Registration.

These contact details will also be utilized for further correspondence by BEML Limited. The change for e-mail and mobile number will not be entertained by BEML during the course of the Recruitment process.
The ‘Registration number’ generated may be noted for all future correspondences.
While filling in the On-line application, the experience section may be filled by first providing the latest experience followed by previous. All such experiences should be captured by the candidate.

In the space provided against the experience a pen picture of the experience relevant to the position applied to must be written. These will be used at the time of scrutinizing the applications received.
important_instructions: Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply. Candidates should apply for only one position which is most suitable. Internal candidates must apply through proper channel. Application fee once paid will not be refunded. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. All updates will be available only on the official BEML website.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BEML Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for BEML Limited Executive Recruitment 2026 is 18 May 2026 up to 06:00 PM. Candidates must complete the registration process within the specified time through the official BEML career portal.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are announced under BEML Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: BEML Limited has announced a total of 18 vacancies for various Executive positions including Deputy General Manager, Assistant General Manager, Senior Manager and Assistant Manager across multiple disciplines.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for BEML Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a First Class full-time Engineering Degree in relevant disciplines such as Mechanical, Electrical, Electronics or Civil Engineering. Some posts may also require additional postgraduate qualifications and relevant work experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for BEML Executive posts in 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit varies according to the post and ranges between 30 years and 57 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved category candidates including SC, ST, OBC and PwD as per Government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for BEML Limited Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes shortlisting of applications followed by assessment or interview. Selected candidates will also have to undergo medical examination and document verification before final appointment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered under BEML Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive an attractive salary package ranging from Rs. 50,000 to Rs. 2,40,000 depending on the grade and position. Additional allowances and PSU benefits will also be applicable as per company norms.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for BEML Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates belonging to General, EWS and OBC categories must pay a non-refundable application fee of Rs. 500. SC, ST and PwD candidates are exempted from payment of the application fee.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply online for BEML Limited Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the official BEML website by accessing the career section and filling out the application form. Applicants must upload educational certificates, experience documents and other required details during registration.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for BEML Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for BEML Limited Executive Recruitment 2026 is 18 May 2026 up to 06:00 PM. Candidates must complete the registration process within the specified time through the official BEML career portal.
